positive: A stylized, whimsical forest scene silhouette. Dominant elements include large, abstract bioluminescent mushrooms, winding root systems, and gentle, floating orbs of light. The composition is highly symmetrical and centered, featuring a clear foreground of stylized foliage and a background gradient of deep indigo and teal. Use a clean, high-contrast color palette emphasizing glowing neon accents (cyan, lime green, magenta) against a rich, dark backdrop. The style should be a blend of modern minimalist vector art and ethereal stained glass etching, suitable for textile printing. Minimal detail clutter, prioritizing strong graphic shapes and clean edges.
negative: blur, artifact, low quality, noise, grain, amateur, text, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, distorted, messy, busy
